HGSS.382.0000:
I heard about the Bug-Catching Contest
where Bug-type lovers gather from all\r
over the region.\f
...Me?
I cannot take Bug types...
HGSS.382.0001:
The Bug-Catching Contest is held on
Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday.\f
Not only do you earn a prize just
for participating, you also get to\r
keep the Bug-type Pokémon you catch.
HGSS.382.0002:
Sorry to tell you this, but the
Pokéathlon Dome is still under\r
construction, and the entrance there\r
is off-limits.\f
You know what a rush construction is?\f
In short, they are working really hard.
It shouldn’t take too long.\f
Just a little more patience, OK?
HGSS.382.0003:
The Pokéathlon Dome is this way.\f
Please go through the entrance gate,
and do participate in the games!
HGSS.382.0004:
Arrgh!\f
When is the Pokéathlon going to
be ready?\f
I can’t just sit here and wait!
I’ll go on an around-Johto run!
HGSS.382.0005:
I’ve been waiting for this moment!\f
Behold my friendship with my Pokémon!
HGSS.382.0006:
I wonder if I can participate, too.
It’s only running with Pokémon, right?
HGSS.382.0007:
Play collectively with your Pokémon,
trust your Pokémon, and believe in your\r
Pokémon’s potential!\f
Your friendship with Pokémon
will make your dream come true!\f
Pokéathlon for you!
HGSS.382.0008:
Charge your energy with friendship!
Give Aprijuice to your Pokémon!
HGSS.382.0009:
Tap tap ding ding!\f
We are in a big hurry!
Just a little more work before you\r
can come through.\f
I hope you are looking forward to it!
HGSS.382.0010:
Hey, hey!
Watch yourself! The construction\r
makes it dangerous around here.\f
Just wait a little longer for the
exciting reveal!\f
